final_response: Drafted revised scope section for Verdant Foods retainer addressing gaps in in-scope/out-of-scope language, change management process, and acceptance criteria. Built from existing engagement context (3-plant deployment, 6 power users, 6-week timeline). Scope clarifies: one round of reconciliation included, custom work requires change order, acceptance timeline explicit. Added section for Marcus confirmation items (plant POCs, system specs, user names).
notes: Used control state folder to ground scope section in actual engagement details: 3 plants, 6 power users (2 per plant), 6-week delivery, March 3 kickoff
Structured scope around common contract dispute vectors: user count limits, change management gating, data work boundaries, training scope ceiling, follow-up support window
Included explicit out-of-scope list to flip burden of proof (Marcus must now request change order for additions, not argue they were implied)
Added acceptance criteria and timeline to reduce subjective 'done' disputes
Left placeholders for signed dates and hourly rates pending user input
